/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/lib "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/crispy.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/i_main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/i_system.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/m_argv.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/m_misc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/d_dedicated.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/d_iwad.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/d_mode.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/deh_str.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/i_timer.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/m_config.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/net_common.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/net_dedicated.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/net_io.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/net_packet.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/net_sdl.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/net_query.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/net_server.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/net_structrw.c.o" "CMakeFiles/crispy-server.dir/z_native.c.o" -o crispy-server  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2main.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2-2.0.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2_mixer/2.8.2/lib/libSDL2_mixer.dylib
